classes.reasoning: This is a Case Report Form (CRF) titled 'eCRF MODULE — ADVERSE EVENT MODULE' with data capture fields for recording adverse events per patient. It includes structured data entry fields for patient code, MedDRA coding, CTCAE grading, causality assessment, and investigator signature block—all hallmarks of a CRF.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) module for capturing individual adverse events in the BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 oncology study. It collects standardized AE data including MedDRA coding, NCI CTCAE v5.0 grading, seriousness criteria, causality to investigational drug BRC-471, and actions taken, with one form completed per adverse event per patient.
